title: Just Silk Touch
description: Removes and disables all Vanilla enchantments except for Silk Touch.
body:
# Just Silk Touch
This mod is a fork of [Enchantment Disable Tag](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-disable-tag) that removes all Vanilla enchantments except for Silk Touch.

![Just Silk Touch in Enchanting Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b66d3fc9bfefd8b339ee4f22f15cd2c273104ee3.png)

This mod can be used as a dependency or in modpacks.
## Client Or Server?
This mod can be installed on the server alone, however it is highly recommended to install it client-side as well for a more complete experience.

Installing this mod on the Client and Server disables enchantments from showing up in The Creative Menu.

![Just Silk Touch in Creative Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f197b98fe49fba9fa555e58c6e20e55962d273e.png)
## JEI Compatibility
Installing JEI with this mod disables Vanilla enchantments from showing up on the JEI menu.
![JEI Compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc4e8b391e57cbb4948636b07af58b0dc276b1a.png)

## Version Support
- Currently only available for Forge 1.20.1
- Will support Fabric and other versions in the future
- Open-Source
